_meta.name: MCMP Chatbot
_meta.description: Visual abstraction of the MCMP Chatbot (mcmp_chatbot repo): Leopold LLM agent with a single MCP Tools node (search_people, search_research, get_events, search_graph) querying two databases. A separate update_dataset.py Tool node writes to the same databases with no LLM orchestrator.

data.name: user_query
data.description: MCMP website visitor asking about events, people, or research topics via the Streamlit chat interface.
data.prompt: Ask me about MCMP events, researchers, or philosophy topics.

data.name: leopold
data.description: Leopold — MCMP Philosophy Assistant. Answers questions about events, people, and research using MCP-backed structured data tools.
data.instruction: You are Leopold, the MCMP Philosophy Assistant. Use the available tools to answer questions about MCMP events, people, and research topics. Always use tools for structured data queries rather than relying on general knowledge.

data.name: leopold_personality
data.description: Leopold persona definition: identity, philosophical tone, scope boundaries, and behavioral guidelines injected into the system prompt.
data.content: prompts/personality.md — Leopold's identity, tone, and response constraints. Separates chatbot character from engine logic.

data.name: mcp_tools
data.description: MCP tool registry exposed to Leopold: search_people, search_research, get_events, search_graph. Each queries the JSON data files or institutional graph.
data.code:
# src/mcp/tools.py
    # search_people(query) — people.json
    # search_research(query) — research.json
    # get_events(query) — raw_events.json
    # search_graph(query) — mcmp_jgraph.json

data.name: json_data_files
data.description: Structured JSON datasets: people.json, research.json, raw_events.json. Accumulated monotonically by the scraper. Source of truth for all MCP queries.

data.name: institutional_graph
data.description: Knowledge graph linking MCMP people to organizational units (chairs, leadership) and research topics. Stored as mcmp_graph.md + mcmp_jgraph.json.

data.name: update_dataset
data.description: scripts/update_dataset.py — scrapes MCMP website (events, people, research) and rebuilds the institutional graph. Runs as a plain Python script with no LLM orchestrator.
data.code:
# scripts/update_dataset.py
    # scrape_events()    → data/raw_events.json
    # scrape_people()    → data/people.json
    # scrape_research()  → data/research.json
    # build_graph()      → data/graph/
